display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page at source_facts.homepage identifies Bibutils.
docs_sources: current_curation.docs includes the official Working with MODS page.
source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge project documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge pages and release archive do not expose a separate official source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists format conversion tools such as bib2xml and xml2bib.
